metadata.description: Reusable skills for development, ops, and productivity — battle-tested patterns with working examples

plugins.name: conventional-commit
plugins.description: Create or draft a Conventional Commits message using the repository's historical language convention, committing only when requested

plugins.name: project-docs-organizer
plugins.description: Build or reorganize project documentation systems with README-only simple projects and major/subcategory numbered docs zones for complex projects

plugins.name: rich-tui-viewer
plugins.description: Build interactive TUI data viewers with Rich + Textual (table overview → click detail → ESC back, dual-mode TUI + CLI)
